proposed_tasks.title: Validate proposal intake and milestone lineage
proposed_tasks.scope_summary: Validate the structured intake, the request brief lineage, and the anchored milestone target.
proposed_tasks.requested_outcome: Produce one contract-valid milestone proposal only when the intake, request brief, and milestone target align.
acceptance_checks: Request lineage resolves to the supplied request brief.
The intake milestone target resolves to the intended milestone.
proposed_tasks.notes: This task anchors proposal generation to explicit structured inputs only.

proposed_tasks.title: Freeze approved milestone task set
proposed_tasks.scope_summary: Turn an operator-approved proposal into one frozen milestone state with the exact proposed task set.
proposed_tasks.requested_outcome: Persist one durable freeze artifact that records operator authority and the exact frozen task set.
acceptance_checks: Frozen task set matches the approved proposal exactly.

proposed_tasks.title: Bind frozen milestone to one Git baseline
proposed_tasks.scope_summary: Capture or validate one Git-backed milestone baseline before later dispatch work.
proposed_tasks.requested_outcome: Record one durable baseline linkage with repository, branch, head commit, and tree identity.
proposed_tasks.notes: This task reuses the existing milestone baseline substrate rather than duplicating it.

proposed_tasks.title: Record one governed Codex dispatch
proposed_tasks.scope_summary: Create the bounded dispatch contract and run ledger for one sequential executor path.
proposed_tasks.requested_outcome: Record one dispatchable task contract with explicit scope, expected outputs, and refusal conditions.
acceptance_checks: Only one active dispatch is allowed.
Dispatch records input refs, baseline ref, and refusal conditions.
proposed_tasks.notes: Dispatch remains bounded to one executor type and one active run at a time.

proposed_tasks.title: Assemble execution evidence and milestone QA observation
proposed_tasks.scope_summary: Roll one completed dispatch into a governed evidence bundle and one milestone-visible QA observation.
proposed_tasks.requested_outcome: Persist changed files, produced artifacts, test outputs, and one QA outcome per task.
acceptance_checks: Missing required evidence blocks bundle assembly.
Blocked or failed QA stops later progression unless the operator overrides it.
proposed_tasks.notes: QA remains bounded to one observation path and one milestone-visible roll-up.

proposed_tasks.title: Generate milestone summary and operator decision packet
proposed_tasks.scope_summary: Summarize the supervised pilot outcome for operator review without taking an automatic decision.
proposed_tasks.requested_outcome: Produce one milestone-level recommendation plus one accept or rework or stop decision packet.
acceptance_checks: Summary covers scope, diffs, tests, blockers, and evidence quality.
Operator receives accept, rework, and stop options only.
proposed_tasks.notes: The milestone closes only through explicit operator review.

assumptions: Operator approval is required before freeze.
Git-backed baseline capture happens before any future dispatch.
notes: Structured milestone proposal intake for the bounded R6 supervised pilot only.
